entry.title: [MR] INSIDE TEHRAN: CIVILIAN SITES HIT IN U.S. & ISRAELI STRIKES | ON THE GROUND
entry.summary:
This report documents visits to several locations in Tehran that the video identifies as having been bombed during the recent U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran. The footage includes a damaged bridge, the Azadi Sports Complex, the Iranian Space Center, Gandhi Hospital, and a Jewish synagogue. At each location, the video examines the visible damage, presents the available evidence discussed in the report, and explores why these sites became part of the conflict.
Rather than relying solely on news coverage, this report takes viewers directly to the locations, documenting the aftermath on the ground and examining the impact on public infrastructure and civilian sites across Tehran. The video also discusses the evidence presented for each location and the broader implications of the strikes. Subscribe for more exclusive reporting, interviews, and on-the-ground coverage from across Iran, including Tehran, Mashhad, and Qom.
#Iran #Tehran #IranNews #WorldNews #BreakingNews #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Geopolitics #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #CurrentEvents #Tehran #IranConflict
entry.content:
This report documents visits to several locations in Tehran that the video identifies as having been bombed during the recent U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran. The footage includes a damaged bridge, the Azadi Sports Complex, the Iranian Space Center, Gandhi Hospital, and a Jewish synagogue. At each location, the video examines the visible damage, presents the available evidence discussed in the report, and explores why these sites became part of the conflict.

Rather than relying solely on news coverage, this report takes viewers directly to the locations, documenting the aftermath on the ground and examining the impact on public infrastructure and civilian sites across Tehran. The video also discusses the evidence presented for each location and the broader implications of the strikes. Subscribe for more exclusive reporting, interviews, and on-the-ground coverage from across Iran, including Tehran, Mashhad, and Qom.

#Iran #Tehran #IranNews #WorldNews #BreakingNews #US #Israel #MiddleEast #Geopolitics #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #CurrentEvents #Tehran #IranConflict

entry.title: [MR] EXCLUSIVE: THE TEAM BEHIND THE VIRAL AI LEGO VIDEOS SPEAKS
entry.summary:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed sits down with the founders of Explosive Media, the Tehran-based creative studio behind the AI-generated Lego-style videos that have captured millions of views across social media. Their distinctive animations have become some of the most recognizable AI-generated content online, blending storytelling, satire, and current events into a unique visual style.
During the conversation, the team discusses how Explosive Media was founded, the creative process behind their viral productions, the AI tools and workflows they use, the challenges of producing large-scale animated content, and their vision for the future of AI-powered filmmaking. They also share insights into the rapid evolution of generative AI, the impact of social media on digital storytelling, and what it takes to create videos that resonate with audiences around the world.
If you're interested in artificial intelligence, filmmaking, animation, content creation, or the future of digital media, this interview offers a rare behind-the-scenes look at one of the most talked-about AI creative teams.
#ArtificialIntelligence #AI #GenerativeAI #ExplosiveMedia #LegoAnimation #AIAnimation #Filmmaking #ContentCreation #DigitalMedia #SulaimanAhmed #ExclusiveInterview #ViralVideos #Animation #CreativeAI #AIArt #Tehran #Iran #Technology #FutureOfAI #BehindTheScenes
entry.content:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed sits down with the founders of Explosive Media, the Tehran-based creative studio behind the AI-generated Lego-style videos that have captured millions of views across social media. Their distinctive animations have become some of the most recognizable AI-generated content online, blending storytelling, satire, and current events into a unique visual style.

During the conversation, the team discusses how Explosive Media was founded, the creative process behind their viral productions, the AI tools and workflows they use, the challenges of producing large-scale animated content, and their vision for the future of AI-powered filmmaking. They also share insights into the rapid evolution of generative AI, the impact of social media on digital storytelling, and what it takes to create videos that resonate with audiences around the world.

If you're interested in artificial intelligence, filmmaking, animation, content creation, or the future of digital media, this interview offers a rare behind-the-scenes look at one of the most talked-about AI creative teams.

entry.title: [MR] EXCLUSIVE: IRAN'S FOREIGN MINISTRY SPOKESPERSON ESMAEIL BAGHAEI SPEAKS
entry.summary:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with Esmaeil Baghaei, spokesperson for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran, for an in-depth discussion on Iran's foreign policy and the major geopolitical developments shaping the Middle East. The conversation explores Iran's diplomatic position, regional security, relations with neighboring countries, and Tehran's perspective on recent international events.
The interview also covers Iran's views on the ongoing regional conflicts, the future of diplomacy, relations with Western governments, and the country's role in an increasingly complex geopolitical landscape. Esmaeil Baghaei responds to key questions regarding Iran's foreign policy priorities and shares the official perspective of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs on issues that continue to shape international affairs.
If you enjoy exclusive interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with senior government officials, subscribe for more in-depth interviews and on-the-ground reporting from Iran and across the Middle East.
#EsmaeilBaghaei #Iran #IranForeignMinistry #ForeignPolicy #SulaimanAhmed #ExclusiveInterview #IranNews #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #WorldNews #InternationalRelations #Diplomacy #Politics #CurrentAffairs #IndependentJournalism #IranInterview #BreakingNews #InternationalPolitics #IranGovernment
entry.content:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with Esmaeil Baghaei, spokesperson for the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Islamic Republic of Iran, for an in-depth discussion on Iran's foreign policy and the major geopolitical developments shaping the Middle East. The conversation explores Iran's diplomatic position, regional security, relations with neighboring countries, and Tehran's perspective on recent international events.

The interview also covers Iran's views on the ongoing regional conflicts, the future of diplomacy, relations with Western governments, and the country's role in an increasingly complex geopolitical landscape. Esmaeil Baghaei responds to key questions regarding Iran's foreign policy priorities and shares the official perspective of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs on issues that continue to shape international affairs.

If you enjoy exclusive interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with senior government officials, subscribe for more in-depth interviews and on-the-ground reporting from Iran and across the Middle East.

entry.title: [MR] I WALKED THE STREETS OF IRAN. THIS IS WHAT PEOPLE TOLD ME
entry.summary:
What is everyday life really like in Iran? Beyond the headlines and political debates, this video explores the streets, markets, neighborhoods, and public spaces across several Iranian cities to capture a firsthand look at daily life. Along the way, I speak with ordinary people about the recent war, how it has affected them, and their perspectives on the events shaping the region.
From historic landmarks and busy streets to spontaneous conversations with local residents, this journey offers a closer look at modern Iran through the eyes of the people who live there. Whether discussing current events, daily life, or the future, these candid conversations provide a unique glimpse into a country that is often viewed only through the lens of international news. If you enjoy independent travel, geopolitics, street interviews, and on-the-ground reporting, subscribe for more exclusive coverage from Iran and across the Middle East.
#Iran #Travel #TravelVlog #IranTravel #StreetInterviews #IranNews #MiddleEast #Geopolitics #WorldNews #TravelDocumentary #Culture #Journalism #CurrentEvents #OnTheGround #Tehran #Mashhad #Qom #IndependentJournalism #MiddleEastNews #SulaimanAhmed
entry.content:

Beyond the headlines and political debates, this video explores the streets, markets, neighborhoods, and public spaces across several Iranian cities to capture a firsthand look at daily life. From historic landmarks and busy streets to spontaneous conversations with local residents, this journey offers a closer look at modern Iran through the eyes of the people who live there. entry.title: [MR] EXCLUSIVE: SENIOR ANSAR ALLAH LEADER HASSAN MOHAMMAD TAHA SPEAKS
entry.summary:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with senior Ansarullah leader Hassan Mohammad Taha about the ongoing conflict in Yemen, regional politics, and the challenges facing the country. The discussion explores the history of the war in Yemen, the Saudi-led military campaign, the blockade imposed on the country, and its humanitarian and political consequences. Hassan Mohammad Taha also shares Ansarullah's perspective on the movement's role in Yemen and the broader developments shaping the Middle East.
The interview also covers Ansarullah's position on Palestine and Gaza, relations with Iran, and the movement's message to Muslim nations and the international community. In addition, Hassan Mohammad Taha discusses the journey to Iran to attend the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, explaining how senior Ansarullah officials were able to travel despite what he describes as the long-standing restrictions and blockade affecting Yemen. This wide-ranging conversation offers insight into the movement's views on the region, current events, and the future of Yemen.
If you enjoy exclusive interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with influential figures from around the world, subscribe for more in-depth interviews, on-the-ground reporting, and coverage from across the Middle East.
#HassanMohammadTaha #Ansarullah #Yemen #SulaimanAhmed #ExclusiveInterview #YemenWar #SaudiArabia #SaudiBlockade #Palestine #Gaza #Iran #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #WorldNews #InternationalRelations #IndependentJournalism #Politics #CurrentAffairs #BreakingNews
entry.content:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with senior Ansarullah leader Hassan Mohammad Taha about the ongoing conflict in Yemen, regional politics, and the challenges facing the country. The discussion explores the history of the war in Yemen, the Saudi-led military campaign, the blockade imposed on the country, and its humanitarian and political consequences. Hassan Mohammad Taha also shares Ansarullah's perspective on the movement's role in Yemen and the broader developments shaping the Middle East.

The interview also covers Ansarullah's position on Palestine and Gaza, relations with Iran, and the movement's message to Muslim nations and the international community. In addition, Hassan Mohammad Taha discusses the journey to Iran to attend the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, explaining how senior Ansarullah officials were able to travel despite what he describes as the long-standing restrictions and blockade affecting Yemen. This wide-ranging conversation offers insight into the movement's views on the region, current events, and the future of Yemen.

If you enjoy exclusive interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with influential figures from around the world, subscribe for more in-depth interviews, on-the-ground reporting, and coverage from across the Middle East.

entry.title: [MR] EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW WITH SENIOR ANSAR ALLAH LEADER MOHAMMED AL-BUKHAITI
entry.summary:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with senior Ansarullah leader Mohammed al-Bukhaiti about some of the most consequential issues facing the Middle East today. The conversation explores the history of the war in Yemen, the Saudi-led military campaign and blockade, the humanitarian impact of the conflict, Ansarullah's political and military position, and the movement's perspective on regional developments.
One of the key topics discussed is how senior Ansarullah officials were able to travel to Iran despite what Mohammed al-Bukhaiti describes as a long-standing blockade and restrictions on Yemen's airspace. He explains the significance of their journey, the challenges involved, and why attending the funeral in Iran was important to the movement. The interview also covers Ansarullah's position on Palestine and Gaza, relations with Iran, the broader geopolitical situation, and Mohammed al-Bukhaiti's message to Muslim nations and the international community.
If you enjoy long-form interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with key figures from around the world, subscribe for more exclusive interviews, in-depth discussions, and on-the-ground reporting.
#MohammedAlBukhaiti #Ansarullah #Yemen #SulaimanAhmed #ExclusiveInterview #MiddleEast #YemenWar #SaudiArabia #SaudiBlockade #Palestine #Gaza #Iran #Geopolitics #WorldNews #MiddleEastNews #InternationalRelations #BreakingNews #Journalism #Politics #CurrentEvents
entry.content:
In this exclusive interview, Sulaiman Ahmed speaks with senior Ansarullah leader Mohammed al-Bukhaiti about some of the most consequential issues facing the Middle East today. The conversation explores the history of the war in Yemen, the Saudi-led military campaign and blockade, the humanitarian impact of the conflict, Ansarullah's political and military position, and the movement's perspective on regional developments.

One of the key topics discussed is how senior Ansarullah officials were able to travel to Iran despite what Mohammed al-Bukhaiti describes as a long-standing blockade and restrictions on Yemen's airspace. He explains the significance of their journey, the challenges involved, and why attending the funeral in Iran was important to the movement. The interview also covers Ansarullah's position on Palestine and Gaza, relations with Iran, the broader geopolitical situation, and Mohammed al-Bukhaiti's message to Muslim nations and the international community.

If you enjoy long-form interviews, geopolitical analysis, and conversations with key figures from around the world, subscribe for more exclusive interviews, in-depth discussions, and on-the-ground reporting.

entry.title: [MR] I SPENT THE ENTIRE DAY IN MASHHAD DURING AYATOLLAH ALI KHAMENEI'S FUNERAL
entry.summary:
The day in Mashhad began long before the funeral ceremony. At 6:00 AM, nearly ten hours before the official procession, thousands of people had already gathered around the Imam Reza Shrine. As the morning progressed, more pilgrims and mourners continued arriving, and by the time the funeral began, millions had filled the streets of Mashhad for one of the largest public gatherings in Iran's recent history. This video follows the day's events from sunrise until late at night, showcasing the atmosphere, the funeral procession, the streets of Mashhad, and the remarkable scenes surrounding the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
From the early morning gathering outside the Imam Reza Shrine to the final moments inside the shrine complex near the grave of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, this video presents a chronological look at one of the most significant days in recent Iranian history. Along the way, you'll see the growing crowds, key moments from the funeral procession, and scenes from across Mashhad as the city welcomed millions of mourners throughout the day. Subscribe for more coverage, interviews, and updates from across Iran, including Tehran, Qom, Mashhad, and beyond.
#AyatollahAliKhamenei #Khamenei #Mashhad #ImamRezaShrine #Iran #IranNews #MashhadNews #WorldNews #BreakingNews #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #CurrentEvents #IranFuneral #LiveFromMashhad #InternationalNews #TravelReport
entry.content:
The day in Mashhad began long before the funeral ceremony. At 6:00 AM, nearly ten hours before the official procession, thousands of people had already gathered around the Imam Reza Shrine. As the morning progressed, more pilgrims and mourners continued arriving, and by the time the funeral began, millions had filled the streets of Mashhad for one of the largest public gatherings in Iran's recent history. This video follows the day's events from sunrise until late at night, showcasing the atmosphere, the funeral procession, the streets of Mashhad, and the remarkable scenes surrounding the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

From the early morning gathering outside the Imam Reza Shrine to the final moments inside the shrine complex near the grave of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, this video presents a chronological look at one of the most significant days in recent Iranian history. Along the way, you'll see the growing crowds, key moments from the funeral procession, and scenes from across Mashhad as the city welcomed millions of mourners throughout the day. Subscribe for more coverage, interviews, and updates from across Iran, including Tehran, Qom, Mashhad, and beyond.

#AyatollahAliKhamenei #Khamenei #Mashhad #ImamRezaShrine #Iran #IranNews #MashhadNews #WorldNews #BreakingNews #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #CurrentEvents #IranFuneral #LiveFromMashhad #InternationalNews #TravelReport

entry.title: [MR] ON THE GROUND IN QOM | AYATOLLAH ALI KHAMENEI'S HISTORIC FUNERAL
entry.summary: Millions of mourners gathered in the holy city of Qom as the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei continued, drawing people from across Iran and around the world. This report follows the day's events from morning until night, capturing the funeral procession as the coffin moved through the streets of Qom, the immense crowds, powerful chants and slogans from mourners, and the atmosphere surrounding one of the most significant events in Iran's modern history. The video also features interviews with people attending the funeral, providing firsthand perspectives on the day's events and what this moment means to them. Filmed entirely on location in Qom, this report documents the day's events as they unfolded, offering a ground-level perspective through exclusive footage and conversations from inside the city. As the coverage concludes, the video also examines breaking developments in the region, including reports that the United States is launching military operations connected to the Strait of Hormuz and what those developments could mean for the rapidly evolving situation. Subscribe for continuing on-the-ground coverage from Iran, including exclusive reports, interviews, and analysis from Tehran, Qom, Mashhad, and beyond. #AyatollahAliKhamenei #Khamenei #Qom #Iran #IranNews #QomNews #WorldNews #BreakingNews #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #Journalism #CurrentEvents #InternationalNews #Documentary #IranFuneral #LiveFromQom #NewsReport #GlobalNews #StraitOfHormuz #USNews #IranUpdates
entry.content:
Millions of mourners gathered in the holy city of Qom as the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei continued, drawing people from across Iran and around the world. This report follows the day's events from morning until night, capturing the funeral procession as the coffin moved through the streets of Qom, the immense crowds, powerful chants and slogans from mourners, and the atmosphere surrounding one of the most significant events in Iran's modern history. The video also features interviews with people attending the funeral, providing firsthand perspectives on the day's events and what this moment means to them.
Filmed entirely on location in Qom, this report documents the day's events as they unfolded, offering a ground-level perspective through exclusive footage and conversations from inside the city. As the coverage concludes, the video also examines breaking developments in the region, including reports that the United States is launching military operations connected to the Strait of Hormuz and what those developments could mean for the rapidly evolving situation. Subscribe for continuing on-the-ground coverage from Iran, including exclusive reports, interviews, and analysis from Tehran, Qom, Mashhad, and beyond.

entry.title: [MR] FUNERAL OF AYATOLLAH ALI KHAMENEI | FULL DAY COVERAGE FROM TEHRAN
entry.summary:
Millions of mourners gathered in Tehran on the third day of the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, transforming the Iranian capital into the center of one of the largest funeral processions in modern history. This video documents the day's events from morning until night, capturing the immense crowds, the funeral procession through the streets of Tehran, the coffin as it moved through the city, and the atmosphere surrounding a historic moment witnessed by people from across Iran and around the world.
This report provides a chronological look at the third day of the funeral through footage from the streets of Tehran. From the scale of the crowds to the emotion of the ceremony, the video offers an up-close perspective on an event that drew global attention. Subscribe for continuing on-the-ground coverage from Iran, including exclusive reports, interviews, and analysis of the region's rapidly developing events.
#AyatollahAliKhamenei #Khamenei #Iran #Tehran #IranNews #TehranNews #Funeral #StateFuneral #WorldNews #BreakingNews #MiddleEast #MiddleEastNews #Geopolitics #InternationalNews #OnTheGround #FieldReport #IndependentJournalism #Journalism #CurrentEvents #IranFuneral #TehranLive #Documentary #TravelDocumentary #Iran2026 #NewsReport #GlobalNews #Persia #IranUpdates #IranEvents #LiveFromTehran
entry.content:
Millions of mourners gathered in Tehran on the third day of the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, transforming the Iranian capital into the center of one of the largest funeral processions in modern history. This video documents the day's events from morning until night, capturing the immense crowds, the funeral procession through the streets of Tehran, the coffin as it moved through the city, and the atmosphere surrounding a historic moment witnessed by people from across Iran and around the world.

This report provides a chronological look at the third day of the funeral through footage from the streets of Tehran. entry.title: [MR] I CAME TO TEHRAN TO WITNESS AYATOLLAH ALI KHAMENEI'S HISTORIC FUNERAL
entry.summary:
I'm officially leaving the United Kingdom and traveling to Iran to provide on-the-ground coverage from Tehran. In this first travel update, I announce my journey, share why I decided to make the trip, and take you along from the very beginning. You'll see my departure, beautiful visuals from Iran, a stopover at Istanbul Airport, and my first moments arriving in Tehran as I prepare to report from inside the country. Over the coming days, I'll be documenting my experience on the ground, speaking with people, capturing the atmosphere, and covering events as they unfold. If you're interested in international affairs, geopolitics, Middle Eastern history, and firsthand reporting from places rarely covered by independent creators, be sure to subscribe and follow this series. This is just the beginning of my journey, and there is much more to come from Tehran and across Iran.
#Iran #Tehran #TravelVlog #OnTheGround #MiddleEast #Geopolitics #IndependentJournalism #IranTravel #CurrentEvents #WorldNews #BreakingNews #TehranJourney #IranCulture #MiddleEastNews #FieldReport #BreakingNews #Geopolitics #MiddleEast #OnTheGround #FieldReport #Journalism #IranTravel #TravelDocumentary #MiddleEastNews #sulaimanahmed
entry.content:
I'm officially leaving the United Kingdom and traveling to Iran to provide on-the-ground coverage from Tehran. In this first travel update, I announce my journey, share why I decided to make the trip, and take you along from the very beginning. You'll see my departure, beautiful visuals from Iran, a stopover at Istanbul Airport, and my first moments arriving in Tehran as I prepare to report from inside the country.
Over the coming days, I'll be documenting my experience on the ground, speaking with people, capturing the atmosphere, and covering events as they unfold. If you're interested in international affairs, geopolitics, Middle Eastern history, and firsthand reporting from places rarely covered by independent creators, be sure to subscribe and follow this series. entry.title: [MR] PROFESSOR PAPE: ISRAEL WILL NOT STOP THIS WAR
entry.summary:
In this video Pepe Escobar breaks down how Iran control the Strait of Hormuz and as such control the world financial economy. Trump is going to have to raise the white flag and accept Iran's terms. Pepe also breaks down the various trade routes and how all routes go through Iran.
Pepe Escobar is a Brazilian journalist. His works have appeared in publications such as Asia Times, Mondialisation.ca, CounterPunch, Al-Jazeera, Press TV, Russia Today, Sputnik, Strategic Culture Foundation and Guancha.
#iran #straitofhormuz #politics #netanyahu #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #pepeescobar #sulaimanahmed
entry.content:
In this video Pepe Escobar breaks down how Iran control the Strait of Hormuz and as such control the world financial economy. Trump is going to have to raise the white flag and accept Iran's terms. Pepe also breaks down the various trade routes and how all routes go through Iran.

Pepe Escobar is a Brazilian journalist. His works have appeared in publications such as Asia Times, Mondialisation.ca, CounterPunch, Al-Jazeera, Press TV, Russia Today, Sputnik, Strategic Culture Foundation and Guancha.

#iran #straitofhormuz #politics #netanyahu #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #pepeescobar #sulaimanahmed

entry.title: [MR] RUSSIA PLAN TO ATTACK POLAND AND MAKE MAJOR PROGRESS ON THE GROUND w/ CIA LARRY JOHNSON
entry.summary:
Larry Johnson speaks about the the Russia and Ukraine war.
Johnson worked at the CIA for four years as an analyst, then moved to the United States State Department's Office of Counterterrorism.
#larryjohnson #ukraine #russia #iran #politics #news #trending #israel #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar
entry.content:
Larry Johnson speaks about the the Russia and Ukraine war.

Johnson worked at the CIA for four years as an analyst, then moved to the United States State Department's Office of Counterterrorism.

entry.title: [MR] NEW CIVIL WAR IN SYRIA AS DRUZE IN SUWAYDA FIGHT AHMAD AL-SHARAA'S ARMY w/ Col Anthony Aguilar
entry.summary:
LT Col Anthony Aguilar speaks about the Iran War and how another aircraft crewman has died. This has not been convered in the mainstream media.
Anthony Aguilar is a retired United States Army Lieutenant Colonel and Special Forces officer (Green Beret) who served for 25 years.
#iran #politics #news #trending #syria #israel #yemen #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #oman #usbases #uae #saudiarabia

entry.title: [MR] ANOTHER U.S AIRCRAFT CREWMAN DEAD OVER THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ w/ Col Anthony Aguilar
entry.summary:
LT Col Anthony Aguilar speaks about the Iran War and how another aircraft crewman has died. This has not been convered in the mainstream media.
Anthony Aguilar is a retired United States Army Lieutenant Colonel and Special Forces officer (Green Beret) who served for 25 years.

entry.summary:
In this video Pepe Escobar breaks down how the Gulf States are kicking America out of theit countries.
Pepe Escobar is a Brazilian journalist. His works have appeared in publications such as Asia Times, Mondialisation.ca, CounterPunch, Al-Jazeera, Press TV, Russia Today, Sputnik, Strategic Culture Foundation and Guancha.

entry.title: [MR] OIL CRISIS IS FAKE, TRUMP & ISRAEL PLAN TO GO BACK TO WAR w/ PAUL CRAIG ROBERTS
entry.summary:
Paul Craig Roberts breaks down why Israel will never leave Lebanon. Their aim is expansionism.
Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.
#iran #politics #news #trending #israel #turkey #abbasaraghchi #blackmail #trump #iranwar #israeliranwar #israeliranwarupdate #war #tehran #worldwar3 #usa #hegseth #negotiations #ceasefire #irannegotiations #straitofhormuz #netanyahu #sulaimanahmed #jdvance #gulfstates #ukraine #russia #ukrainerussia #russiaukrainewar #lebanon #lebanonwar #lebanonisrael #usbases #irandeal #dimona #oil

Paul Craig Roberts breaks down why Israel will never leave Lebanon. Their aim is expansionism.

Paul Craig Roberts is an economist and author. He formerly held a sub-cabinet office in the United States federal government as well as teaching positions at several U.S. universities. He is a promoter of supply-side economics and an opponent of recent U.S. foreign policy.

entry.title: [MR] PROFESSOR MARANDI: IRAN WILL KEEP NUCLEAR, WHY LEBANON IS BEING CONSULTED
entry.summary:
Professor Marandi speaks about the Iran's position on nuclear enroched uranium.
Professor Mohammad Marandi is one of the most prominent voices on the Iran conflict, regularly appearing on BBC, Al Jazeera, CNN, and Sky News. He is a professor of English Literature and Orientalism at the University of Tehran and a former adviser to Iran's nuclear negotiation team.

Professor Mohammad Marandi is one of the most prominent voices on the Iran conflict, regularly appearing on BBC, Al Jazeera, CNN, and Sky News. He is a professor of English Literature and Orientalism at the University of Tehran and a former adviser to Iran's nuclear negotiation team.
